name.description: The name of the autoscaling policy

autoscaling_group_name.description: The name of the autoscaling group

adjustment_type.description: The type of adjustment to make to the autoscaling group

estimated_instance_warmup.description: Estimated time, in seconds, until a newly launched instance will contribute CloudWatch metrics

enabled.description: Whether the scaling policy is enabled

cooldown.description: Amount of time, in seconds, after a scaling activity completes and before the next scaling activity can start.

step_adjustment.type: list(object({scaling_adjustment: number, metric_interval_lower_bound: number, metric_interval_upper_bound: number}))

target_tracking_configuration.type: list(object({target_value: number, disable_scale_in: bool, predefined_metric_specification: optional(list(object({predefined_metric_type: string, resource_label: string}))), customized_metric_specification: list(object({metric_name: string, namespace: string, statistic: string, unit: string, metric_dimension: list(object({name: string, value: string})), metrics: optional(list(object({expression: string, label: string, id: string, return_data: bool, metric_stat: list(object({metric: list(object({metric_name: string, namespace: string, dimensions: list(object({name: string, value: string}))})), stat: string, period: number, unit: string}))})))}))}))

predictive_scaling_configuration.type: list(object({max_capacity_breach_behavior: string, max_capacity_buffer: number, mode: string, scheduling_buffer_time: number, metric_specification: list(object({target_value: number, customized_capacity_metric_specification: list(object({metric_data_queries: list(object({expression: string, id: string, label: string, return_data: bool, metric_stat: list(object({metric: list(object({metric_name: string, namespace: string, dimensions: list(object({name: string, value: string}))})), stat: string, unit: string}))}))})), customized_load_metric_specification: list(object({metric_data_queries: list(object({expression: string, id: string, label: string, return_data: bool, metric_stat: list(object({metric: list(object({metric_name: string, namespace: string, dimensions: list(object({name: string, value: string}))})), stat: string, unit: string}))}))})), customized_scaling_metric_specification: list(object({metric_data_queries: list(object({expression: string, id: string, label: string, return_data: bool, metric_stat: list(object({metric: list(object({metric_name: string, namespace: string, dimensions: list(object({name: string, value: string}))})), stat: string, unit: string}))}))})), predefined_scaling_metric_specification: list(object({predefined_metric_type: string, resource_label: string})), predefined_load_metric_specification: list(object({predefined_metric_type: string, resource_label: string})), predefined_metric_pair_specification: list(object({predefined_metric_type: string, resource_label: string}))}))}))
